issues.detail: The skill does not address error handling or edge cases for applying psychological principles.
The skill contains extensive descriptive text that may overwhelm users, lacking concise guidance.
The skill references a Claude-specific file path, limiting compatibility with other AI platforms.

scenarios.name: SaaS pricing tier reduction
scenarios.rationale: Baseline covers tier reduction and charm pricing but misses Decoy Effect ordering, Anchoring sequence, and Mental Accounting reframe that the treatment names explicitly.

scenarios.name: Freemium-to-paid conversion lift
scenarios.rationale: Treatment applies Endowment, IKEA, Zeigarnik, Loss Aversion, Goal-Gradient and BJ Fogg's motivation+ability+prompt triad with concrete trigger moments; baseline misses the user-created-asset framing and the three-factor behavior model.
